message:
fix: complete ANSI escape sequence handling and Go-compatible alignment

ANSI escape sequence improvements:
- Add support for DCS (ESC P), SOS (ESC X), PM (ESC ^), APC (ESC _) sequences
- Previously only OSC (ESC ]) was handled; now all string-type sequences work
- All string-type sequences terminate on BEL (\x07) or ST (ESC \)
- Fixes truncation bugs when terminal output contains these escape codes

Alignment rounding fix:
- Change from round() to floor() for alignment factor calculations
- Matches Go's int() truncation behavior (Go: int(5 * 0.5) = 2, not 3)
- Affects join_horizontal, join_vertical, and style alignment methods
- Updated test expectations to match Go reference implementation

Files page zero-height guard:
- Add early return when visible_rows is 0 to prevent potential issues
- Simplify scroll calculation since guard eliminates edge case

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
